title: Bianca Del Rio: Dead Inside World Comedy Tour
full_description: Bianca Del Rio — the world's most decorated drag comedian and first drag queen to headline Wembley Arena and Carnegie Hall — takes her razor-sharp wit on the road for 60 North American dates. Covering politics, pop culture, cancel culture, and everyday life through the eyes of someone who's dead inside. Lightning-fast, brutally funny, with extensive audience interaction.
ai_summary: Bianca Del Rio's acclaimed Dead Inside comedy tour — 60 dates across the US and Canada — brings her legendary caustic humour and unmatched crowd-work to arenas, covering cancel culture, politics, and the absurdity of daily life with a lightning-fast delivery.
